user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new escalation matrix with a matrix name and associated email ids, so that escalations are routed to the correct people
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Escalation Matrix screen; When I click Add new escalation matrix and enter a name and email id(s); Then the matrix is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define multiple escalation levels each with their own email recipients, so that issues escalate through the right chain
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating escalation matrices; When I add levels such as Escalation Level 1, 2 and 3 with distinct emails; Then each level is saved with its recipient email

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the escalation matrix list, so that I see the latest configured matrices
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Escalation Matrix screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current matrices

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all configured escalation matrices with their email recipients, so that I can verify escalation routing at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given escalation matrices exist; When I open the Escalation Matrix screen; Then each matrix name and its email id(s) are listed
